message:
chore: bump version to 0.1.1 and update lockfile

- Version bumped from 0.1.0 to 0.1.1 for the credential resolution overhaul,
  Anthropic base URL fix, OAuth CSRF validation, and keyless model support.
- Cargo.lock updated: asupersync dependency changed from bincode to
  bincode-next (upstream crate rename).
- .gitignore: added release_artifacts/ to prevent build output from being
  tracked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -88,6 +88,7 @@ tests/edit_repro.rs
 
 # Build artifacts (concurrent agent output)
 artifacts/
+release_artifacts/
 
 # Python bytecode caches
 __pycache__/

@@ -278,7 +278,7 @@ name = "asupersync"
 version = "0.2.3"
 dependencies = [
  "base64",
- "bincode",
